top_signals.title: Oil, Dollar Climb With US-Iran Deal Still Elusive: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil climbed and the dollar strengthened as tensions remained elevated in the Middle East, with negotiations over a permanent US-Iran ceasefire showing little sign of a breakthrough.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Berkshire Hathaway makes $6.8 billion housing bet with Taylor Morrison deal
top_signals.summary: The acquisition marks one of the first major strategic deals under Warren Buffett's successor Greg Abel, who took over as CEO in the beginning of 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Isabel Schnabel: From money market funds to stablecoins: lessons for central banks
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Vietnam’s Gene Solutions Eyes Hong Kong IPO to Fund Expansion
top_signals.summary: Vietnamese diagnostic testing startup Gene Solutions is preparing for a Hong Kong initial public offering as early as the second quarter of next year, a rare local firm seeking to access deeper capital markets and boost international visibility.
